message:
🌱 containerd: Containers with curl based health checks becoming unresponsive (#1911)

* 🌱 Add containerd: Containers with curl based health checks becoming mission

* 🌱 Add containerd: Containers with curl based health checks becoming mission

@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "containerd-4509-containers-with-curl-based-health-checks-becoming-unresponsive",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "containerd: Containers with curl based health checks becoming unresponsive",
+    "description": "Containers with curl based health checks becoming unresponsive. This issue affects 27+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify containerd troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your containerd deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for error: `context deadline exceeded\"``"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review containerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd\n```\n**Description**\n\nAfter containerd update to 1.4.0, running a Docker container with a health check using curl (specifically bitwardenrs/server and plex images) will result in an 'unhealthy' status after 15 minutes or so."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Containers with curl based health checks becoming…",
+        "description": "Docker hardcodes shim v1.\nThis will be fixed in Docker 20.x.\n\n--- EDIT fix typo\n```yaml\n\"Log\": [\n  {\n    \"Output\": \"OCI runtime exec failed: exec failed: cannot exec a container that has stopped: unknown\"\n  }\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Containers with curl based health checks becoming… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that `context deadline exceeded\"`` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Docker hardcodes shim v1.\nThis will be fixed in Docker 20.x.\n\n--- EDIT fix typo",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "\"Log\": [\n  {\n    \"Output\": \"OCI runtime exec failed: exec failed: cannot exec a container that has stopped: unknown\"\n  }",
+        "level=warning msg=\"runtime v1 is deprecated since containerd v1.4, consider using runtime v2\"",
+        "$ pacman -Q $(pactree -u docker)\ndocker 1:19.03.12-2\nglibc 2.32-4\nlinux-api-headers 5.8-1\ntzdata 2020a-1\nfilesystem 2020.08.21-1\niana-etc 20200812-2\nbridge-utils 1.7-1\niproute2 5.8.0-1\niptables 1:1.8.5-2\nlibnftnl 1.1.7-1\nlibmnl 1.0.4-3\nlibpcap 1.9.1-2\nlibnl 3.5.0-2\nbash 5.0.018-1\nreadline 8.0.004-1\nncurses 6.2-1\ngcc-libs 10.2.0-2\nlibusb 1.0.23-2\nsystemd-libs 246.3-1\nlibcap 2.43-1\nattr 2.4.48-3\nlibgcrypt 1.8.6-1\nlibgpg-error 1.39-1\nlz4 1:1.9.2-2\nxz 5.2.5-1\nzstd 1.4.5-1\nzlib 1:1.2.11-4\ndbus 1.12.20-1\nexpat 2.2.9-3\naudit 2.8.5-6\nkrb5 1.18.2-1\ne2fsprogs 1.45.6-2\nlibutil-linux 2.36-2\nlibldap 2.4.50-2\nlibsasl 2.1.27-3\nopenssl 1.1.1.g-2\nperl 5.32.0-1\ngdbm 1.18.1-3\ndb 5.3.28-5\nkeyutils 1.6.3-1\nlibcap-ng 0.7.11-1\nlibnfnetlink 1.0.1-4\nlibnetfilter_conntrack 1.0.8-1\nlibelf 0.180-1\nbzip2 1.0.8-3\ncurl "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "containerd",
+      "graduated",
+      "runtime",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "containerd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/4509",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/containerd/containerd"
+    },
+    "reactions": 27,
+    "comments": 58,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with containerd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:30:27.522Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
